title: Customer
description: A customer record in Microsoft Dynamics 365, representing a person or organization that purchases goods or services.

id.description: The unique identifier of the customer.

displayName.description: The display name of the customer.

addressLine1.description: The first line of the customer address.

addressLine2.description: The second line of the customer address.

city.description: The city of the customer address.

state.description: The state or province of the customer address.

country.description: The country or region of the customer address.

postalCode.description: The postal code of the customer address.

phoneNumber.description: The phone number of the customer.

email.description: The email address of the customer.

website.description: The website URL of the customer.

currencyCode.description: The default currency code for the customer.

blocked.description: Indicates whether the customer is blocked for transactions.

balance.description: The current balance of the customer.

lastModifiedDateTime.description: The date and time the record was last modified.
